summary: A subtitled compilation of grainy 2006 Minnesota Senate debate footage (showing candidates including Amy Klobuchar and Carla Johnson) used to argue that border security was once bipartisan common sense. It is lightly-edited archival TV footage with caption overlays and no music or song. It carries a political/argumentative message rather than youth-appeal entertainment styling, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: 2006 MINNESOTA SENATE DEBATE; 700-MILE FENCE ON; THOUSANDS OF; GONE WAY DOWN; AMY KLOBUCHAR (DFL) U.S. Senate Candidate; CARLA JOHNSON
